mail.gift.0: It's dangerous to go alone. Take this!^^    -{1} from {2}
mail.gift.1: Hopefully, this {0} will convince you to leave the Burger King...^^    -{1} from {2}
mail.gift.3: I thought you could use this {0} from {2}^^    -{1}
mail.gift.4: I heard you wanted a {0}?^I found one in {2}^^    -{1}
mail.gift.5: Greetings from {2}^^I got a {0} for you!^^    -{1}
mail.gift.6: I can't carry {0} for you, but I can carry you!^^    -{1} from {2}
mail.gift.7: May your {0} be laid under an enchantment of surpassing excellence for seven years!^^    -{1} from {2}
mail.gift.8: There's some good in this world, Mr. @. And it's worth fighting for.^^    -{1} from {2}
mail.gift.9: Take this {0}. It contains the Light of Earendil, our most beloved star.^^May it be a light to you in dark places, when all other lights go out.^^    -{1} from {2}
mail.gift.10: You had {0} on the shopping list right? Picked it up for you^^    -{1} from {2}
mail.gift.11: It's not too late for Christmas in July right? Here, I got you a {0}, I know you have been looking for it.^^    -{1} from {2}
mail.gift.12: I hope it's summer, cause I got you this {0} for the Luau^^    -{1} from {2}
mail.gift.13: I hear you need something for you 'secret friend' this winter and boy do I have the perfect item for you: {0}. No need to thank me, I'm sure it's exactly what you needed.^^    -{1} from {2}
mail.gift.14: You still need one more item for your grange display at the Fair, right? Here's your winner: a freshly caught {0}, straight from the {2} seas.^^    -{1}
mail.gift.15: I know you've been trying hard to win over a partner for the Flower Dance. This {0} is sure to win over your crush. I just know they'll love it.^^    -{1} from {2}
mail.gift.16: I have travelled far and wide for you my lord!^^ Tirelessly, day and night until finally, I reached {2}. There, I found {0} for you. My quest is complete!^^ May I have that cookie now?^^ -{1}
mail.gift.17: Don't worry, I didn't forget your upcoming marriage. Here's a {0} for your gift!^^ -{1}
mail.item.0: Hey @, I was at {2}, minding my own business, and there I found a {0}.^I thought you would make better use of it than I ever could.^^    -{1}
mail.item.2: There was a {0} in my {2}.^Do you think you can make it useful?^^    -{1}
mail.item.3: Hey @, I was passing by {2} when I found a {0}. You gotta stop leaving your stuff lying around!^^    -{1}
mail.item.4: This is an official notice.^You have been charged and found guilty of 1 case of Littering within multiworld bounds.^{1} was able to identify the {0} left near {2} as yours, so it has been returned to you.^Please leave your trash in appropriate receptacles.^^    -APPD
mail.item.5: Hello Valued Customer!^At Jojamart, we understand how hard it can be to get the things you need for a price you can pay.^Please take this free* gift, a {0}, as a token of our good faith.^We would greatly appreciate it if you consider your pre-approved credit card offer enclosed.^^*No monetary costs were incurred by Jojamart  during the procurement of this item from {2}. The mental health of the affected employee {1} is classified.^^    -Joja Customer Representative
mail.item.6: I was thinking of you today, so when I saw this {0} at {2}, I thought it would make a perfect gift!^^    -{1}
mail.item.7: I know, I know, your birthday was a while ago. Sorry this is so late. It took me a while to get this {0}. It was only being sold at {2}, can you believe that?!^^    -{1}
mail.item.8: It's dangerous to go alone. Take this! ({0})^^    -{1}
mail.item.10: You are a cool person. And because you're cool, I went all the way to {2} to grab your {0}.^^    -{1}
mail.item.11: You're our 10,000th* Subscriber!^^Please take this {0}, freshly discovered for you at {2}! Click below to claim your prize!^^*Subscriber count may vary. All items are non-refundable. {1} Inc. is not liable for any illness, financial loss or harm to self that occur to the recipient.
mail.item.12: Here at Jojamart, we take pride in being aggressively progressive.^We're currently surveying cooperative* individuals on our progressive products.^Please take the time to test and review this {0}. Then contact your designated reviewer {1} at 1-800-867-5309.^^*All employees, current and prior have agreed to this in their contract, lasting in perpetuity.^Unsubscription is expressly forbidden under Article 307 subsection 4546B clause 3-4
mail.item.13: The Stardew Valley Tribune is proud to announce our victory in the recent Ferngill Republic Journalism Ceremony, a contest across the entire nation.^This is due in no small part to our article on your farm, @.^As a token of our gratitude, please take this {0}, which was carefully procured from {2}.^Thank you for your continued support!^^    -Agricultural Editor {1}
mail.item.14: Status report.^World infiltration completed.^Retrieval of {0} from {2} successful.^Agent {1} sends their regards.^Unit will fall back and wait for further instructions.
mail.item.15: i maed you a cukie but i eated it. have this {0} instaed^^    -{1}
mail.item.16: Me hat seller, poke. {1} dropped {0} off here. Me giving it to you okay poke? They say it come from {2}.
mail.item.17: Declaration of returned goods.^^{0} is being returned to you after seizure by multiworld officers from {1}. Suspect was found near {2} with stolen goods in hand and have been detained for further questioning.^^    -APPD
mail.item.18: Statement of Accounts^{1} Credit Union^Overpaid Balance: 1 {0}^See contained check below.^You may cash at your local {2} or go online with our App
mail.item.19: Find enclosed your prescription {0}. Remember to always follow the instructions on the bottle.^If you experience nausea, headaches or bouts of desire to go to Burger King, please consult your physician.^^Brought to you by {1} Pharmacies
mail.item.20: So, hear me out, I know you wanted a cool sword, but I got you this {0} instead. It was free, found it on the road by {2}. Cheers!^^    -{1}
mail.item.21: Hopefully, this {0} will convince you to leave the Burger King...^^    -{1}
mail.item.22: Here, have this letter.^^    -{1}^^^^^^^^^PS: also a {0} k thx bye
mail.item.23: I have something here for you. Your father wanted you to have this when you were old enough, but your uncle wouldn't allow it. He feared you  might follow old {1} on some damned-fool idealistic crusade like your father did. Your father's {0}. This is the weapon of a Jedi Knight. An elegant weapon, for a more civilized age.
mail.item.24: {1}^Incoming Trade Offer:^^I Receive: Your Undying Love and Affection^^You receive: {0}
mail.item.25: Grandpa's {0}^He's gone to stay with the dwarves. He's left you {4}, along with all of his possessions. The {0} is yours now. Keep it secret. Keep it safe
mail.item.26: Dear valued customer.^Joja Online is proud to introduce our new line of innovative products! To celebrate, please enjoy this free sample of {1}'s {0}, made with the finest ingredients from local farmers and artisans from {2}! Now available in the Joja Online shop!
mail.item.27: Dear valued customer,^We are sorry to hear that your package was lost in transit through Joja Prime. Find enclosed your replacement {0}. {1} will be appropriately disciplined for their negligence.^Have a wonderful day!
mail.item.28: Hey, just got back from the Burger King on {2} road.^I got you a {0} so you hopefully don't need to go there.^Enjoy!^^    -{1}
mail.item.29: Send me items!^I'll pay handsomely!^Have this {0} as a down payment. I'm expecting great things from you.^^    -{1}
mail.item.30: Hey, I was going through Grandpa's stash at {2}, and I found this {0}, along with a bunch of turnips.^Grandpa did always have strange tastes...^^    -{1}
mail.item.31: I have no idea what's going on, but I found this {0} with your name on it.^^    -{1}
mail.item.32: Hey, Pierre sent me this {0}, but I can't stand the things. So now it's yours.^^    -{1}
mail.item.33: I couldn't get Oak's Parcel back from the thieves, but hopefully you can put {0} to good use instead^^    -{1}
mail.item.34: You should show this {0} to [CommunityName], I bet they didn't even know it existed!^^    -{1}
mail.item.35: Try putting this {0} in the Luau soup!^^    -{1}
mail.item.36: I'm entrusting you with this {0}. I know you'll treat it well. See to it that it makes it to the destination^^    -{1}
mail.item.37: Hi, I work for one of Joja's competitors, the up and coming {2} Mart! We sell a variety of goods and services. Here, I'd like you to have this {0} as a promotional item! A {0} can be used at any time, so it's even more useful than a Pokemon Center! Have a nice day and please stop by sometime.^^    -{1}
mail.item.38: Here take this {0}! It's comfy and easy to wear!^^    -{1}
mail.item.40: Who ordered the {0} from {2}? Oh, you did.^^    -{1}
mail.item.41: I sold my best podracer for this {0}. You're free now^^    -{1}
mail.item.42: The {2} animal shelter didn't have any cats, so I got you a {0} out of their dumpster instead.^^    -{1}
mail.item.43: {1} went on vacation to {2} and all they came back with was {0}
mail.item.44: Hey, have you heard about the legendary power of the {0}? They say if you share it with someone you really care for, it binds you together forever and ever, through eternity.^^    -{1}
mail.item.45: The {0} is a tool that can unlock any lock, whether on a door, a chest, or a heart. It is a powerful weapon that chooses it's owner. It did not choose me.^^It chose you.^^    -{1}
mail.item.46: You must use the {0} to defeat the darkness
mail.item.47: Have you ever heard the story of {0}?  I thought not.  It's not a story {1} would tell you.
mail.item.48: OR, hear me out, we just collect random things people say from Discord and compile them into a massive string library so that every letter is interesting and unique so people don't feel annoyed having to read them^^    -Madolinn^^{0} from {1}
mail.item.49: I searched for the perfect item to show my feelings for you, and I got you this {0}^^    -Secret Admirer
mail.item.50: I got up early to deliver this mail and all you got was a {0}.
mail.item.51: I found this {0} in the back of the mail truck, it has been there a few weeks hope it isn't important.
mail.item.52: If you look closely, you might just find a {0} hidden in the fine print.
mail.item.53: Are you still looking for your Community Center?  Have you checked in Aginah's cave?  In the meantime, have this {0}.
mail.item.54: {1} was piloted to find your {0}. That means it is important, right?
mail.item.55: {1} was piloted to find your {0}. I think it might have been a mistake.
mail.item.56: Hey, at least this isn't an Emblem for Sonic^^    -{1}^^({0})
mail.item.57: Hey, at least this isn't a Coin Bundle for DLCQuest^^    -{1}^^({0})
mail.item.58: My original letter wasn't safe for streaming, so you're getting this one instead. Here's your {0}.^^    -{1}
mail.item.59: Hope you can add this {0} to your power suit like we can here on Zebes^^    -{1}
mail.item.60: Don't worry I didn't forget your birthday, I got you {0}, I hope you love it.^^    -{1}
mail.item.61: So here you are again.^^ Playing another Archipelago seed.^^ You know what you could be doing?^^ Playing your backlog.^^ But no, gotta play them classics.^^ -{1} ({0})
mail.item.62: Have you ever played Junimo Kart? I love it, it's just a nice chill game. Here's some {0} so you can play.^^   -{1}
mail.item.63: Aiyhd ndi hjsajkhndb mkss? Fjdskn udf thene ksskdu {0}! Dfsbdubfsken nmsd tr {2}.^^   -{1}
mail.item.64: I found a new game in the same technology document and I worry that this becomes a thread about the manual implementation, and the {0} are shuffled. This is a huge breakthrough!^^   -Sent from {1}'s iPhone
mail.item.65: This {0} dropped on my head. When I looked up, I saw a swallow flying away! I have no idea how a 1 oz bird carried this. I didn't think they migrated at all, much less to {2}!^^ -{1}
mail.item.66: I found this {0} while I was inside the back of my moving van bound for Hoenn. It has your name on it, so here you go.^^ -{1}
mail.item.67: I don't remember if you were trying to perfect yourself and reach the summit, but here's a {0} for the journey!^^ -{1}
mail.item.68: I walk this {2} road.^The only road that I have ever known.^Don't know where it goes, but it's only me and this {0}>^^ -{1}
mail.item.69: I'm sorry @, but this {0} was in {2} castle.^^ - {1}
mail.item.70: Honey, wake up! {2} just dropped a new {0}!^^ -{1}
mail.item.71: I'm sending you this {0} in the hopes you'll be able to decipher it's secrets.^^ I found it at the {2} Ruins.^^ -{1}
mail.item.72: I knew that you would leave the forest someday, @.^^ I want you to have this {0}.^^ Please take good care of it.^^ -{1}
mail.item.73: I need you to begin work on project {2}.^^ I have enclosed {0} for supplies.^^ I expect your report on my my desk on Tuesday morning.^^ -{1}
mail.item.74: Life is like a box of {0}.^^ You never know what you're gonna get.^^ -{1}
mail.item.75: I know people collect stuff like stamps, but I've never met anyone like you. ^^ Why do you collect {0}???^^ Please tell me, I have to know!^^ - {1}
mail.item.76: They had a {0} convention in town over the weekend, so I stopped by to get you one.^^ -{1}
mail.item.77: I hear that {1} can find your {0} at {2}.^^^^^^ Wait, this isn't a hint location...
mail.item.78: Did you know? You're seeing I sent you this {0} due to an effect in your brain called sight.^^ -{1}
mail.item.79: Did you know? I got you this {0} by pressing buttons with these things we have called hands.^^ -{1}

tv.lotl.tip_0: You may be used to this show airing on Mondays and Thursdays, but we are now airing on Tuesdays and Fridays as well! Tune in for brand new tips!
tv.lotl.tip_1: Did you know that we're not the only station with an extended schedule? Our friends at The Queen of Sauce are now airing an extra episode every Saturday!
tv.lotl.tip_2: Today we have a special guest in our studio! Please welcome... 'Rasmodius, Explorer of the Arcane'..? Sure thing buddy, the floor is yours!^^A very precious item was taken from me. It looks like ordinary ink, but it has power beyond your imagination. If you were to stumble upon it, please deliver it back to me. You will be generously rewarded. Make sure you speak to me directly!^^You heard the man folks, keep an eye out and you might earn something good!
tv.lotl.tip_3: A friend of mine once told me of a story. Late in fall, they turned on their TV, and it seemed to be... haunted? I'm not sure I believe such a fairytale, but I thought it was interesting. There's something sinister about the signals you can receive on there. But the guy is kind of a deadbeat, so he was probably just pulling my leg.
tv.lotl.tip_4: Some farmers enjoy going to the mines in their free time. That's fine, it's a good way to get ores and other valuable trinkets! Make sure you bring a weapon with you though, there are some nasty creatures down there. If you lost your weapon, check out your local adventure guild, I'm sure they'll be happy to help. You can even phone them! They do deliveries!
tv.lotl.tip_5: Animal or Human, everyone enjoys a good cuddle at night!
tv.lotl.tip_6: If you steal from your friends, they might resent you. But if you're close enough, usually they won't mind sharing some of their favorite items with you!
tv.lotl.tip_7: I heard a rumor going around that some magically-attuned people have invented a magical clock that can skip time ahead. That sounds crazy, but I'm a big fan of folklore!
tv.lotl.tip_8: There are legends among veteran fisherman, talking of fish that are stronger and rarer than all others. They claim there is only one of each, but that's just folklore. They are species like any other, don't overfish them!
tv.lotl.tip_9: We recently got a call-in from a viewer in a discordant land. Apparently, over there, they have a lot of support for budding farmers. If you can pin down where they are, you'll even find guides and other resources!
tv.lotl.tip_10: Sometimes, you might be a bit lost, and not know what is your purpose in life. Most cultures recommend looking to your ancestors for guidance. That's a bit old-fashioned, but sometimes an elder will have left you something that will help you figuring out your journey. Maybe a letter or something?
tv.lotl.tip_11: Ever wanna take a long nap and wake up to a bunch of days gone by? We've all been there. Just remember, while you're snoozin', your friends and pets might feel a mite neglected. Balance, that's the name of the game!
tv.lotl.tip_12: A backpack is a farmer's best friend. Out there somewhere, there's one for you too, just waitin' to be found. No fuss, no muss, just keep yours wits about ya, and maybe you'll stumble upon it!
tv.lotl.tip_13: The climate can be a bit unpredictable these days. Sometimes it can be hot for months in a row. Don't hesitate to make the most of it with regrowing crops!
tv.lotl.tip_14: With the climate anomalies happening recently, even I tend to get confused about what season we're in. Please forgive me if I get something wrong. These are unprecedented times after all!
tv.lotl.tip_15: Let's talk about crops. They don't all have the same value, but money is not everything, trust me. Even if you have access to more valuable crops, it's usually a good idea to plant a little bit of everything. You never know what you might find comes harvest day!
tv.lotl.tip_16: We all gotta make a living somehow. Some people opt to gather interesting stuff, and move from town to town to sell it. They can provide out of season seeds, crops and fish. I hear some even use metal detectors to find and sell minerals and artifacts. How crazy is that?
tv.lotl.tip_17: Being friendly is generally a good thing, but you don't want to be taken advantage of either. Don't bother being too much more friendly to someone who isn't reciprocating yet. Give them time, I'm sure you'll be best buddies in a jiffy!
tv.lotl.tip_18: Most bars have old-timey video games available in them. These old games often contain cheat codes, but can only be used once you beat the game once. So you don't need to go back to do everything you missed, a simple command will do the trick!
tv.lotl.tip_19: Don't forget to never judge a book by its cover. Sometimes, even the most unassuming of doors can hide an extremely valuable interior. It's always worth a knock!
tv.lotl.tip_20: I heard a new show started airing recently. Tune in on Mondays and Fridays for... 'The Gateway Gazette'? I wonder what that's about...
tv.lotl.tip_21: Life offers many doors, but some days, you might walk into one, and it's just a closet. Don't sweat it! Self care sometimes means going back to bed and calling it a day.
tv.lotl.tip_22: Farmers don't always have it easy, so we need to stick together! Sending a gift to a farmer, even one far away, can do wonders to build community and make their day better! Just remember there's a fee. Worth it for the smiles it brings!
tv.lotl.tip_23: If you have a friend who needs to do a lot of running around, you can give them a coffee. I'm sure they'll appreciate the speed boost!
tv.lotl.tip_24: Opening your mail is usually pleasant, but sometimes, life throws you a curveball. Those unexpected surprises ain't nothin' to lose sleep over. They're just a little hiccup, no big deal. Keep smilin'!
tv.lotl.tip_25: We have had reports of mail letters across the countryside being delivered with nasty surprises in them. Don't let 'em ruffle your feathers! Stay sharp and find a way to turn the tables. Remember, adversity's the best teacher on the rocky road of life!
tv.lotl.tip_26: I've heard a good story the other day. Apparently, there's a white-haired woman hiding in Cindersap forest. She only comes out at night, and it seems she's quite the troublemaker. But I'm sure that's just a myth to scare the kiddos into going to bed!
tv.lotl.tip_27: Brave adventurers are always talking about myths and legends. Rumor has it that, if you go deep into the woods, and you're lucky enough, you might encounter magical beings. The experience of petting a unicorn is unrivaled! But also, some people just dump their trash there. Try your luck!
tv.lotl.tip_28: We got a letter from a folk all the way back in {2}. They recommend completing a... '{0}'?. I don't know what that is, but apparently, it's great! You should really get on that!
tv.lotl.tip_29: ...and that folks is how an ol' goblin changed my friend's life around.  Who knew a crayfish dish would be the thing to do it!  I say pay it forward.  Who knows, even goblins might teach ya a thing or two!
tv.lotl.tip_30: Now here's an odd rumor from an ol' miss up in Grampleton.  Mystics capable of turning the weave so thoroughly you can even hear their whispers over the radio!  Might help in a pinch I say!
goal.grandpa_evaluation: Complete Grandpa's Evaluation with a score of at least 12 (4 candles)
goal.bottom_of_mines: Reach Floor 120 in the Pelican Town Mineshaft
goal.cryptic_note: Find Secret Note #10 and complete the "Cryptic Note" Quest
goal.master_angler: Catch every single one of the 55 fish available in the game
goal.complete_collection: Complete the Museum Collection by donating all 95 items
goal.full_house: Get married and have two children
goal.protector_of_the_valley: Complete all the monster slaying goals
grandpa.grandpa_evaluation: Make the most of this farm, and make me proud
grandpa.bottom_of_mines: Finish exploring the mineshaft in this town for me
grandpa.community_center: Restore the old Community Center for the sake of all the villagers
grandpa.cryptic_note: Meet an old friend of mine on floor 100 of the Skull Cavern
grandpa.master_angler: Catch and document every specie of fish in the Ferngill Republic
grandpa.complete_collection: Restore our beautiful museum with a full collection of various artifacts and minerals
grandpa.full_house: I wish for my bloodline to thrive. Please find a partner and live happily ever after
grandpa.greatest_walnut_hunter: Prove your worth to an old friend of mine, and become the greatest walnut hunter
grandpa.protector_of_the_valley: Make sure the valley is safe for generations to come. Rip and tear, until it is done
grandpa.full_shipment: Contribute to the local economy and market, by shipping as many things as you can
grandpa.gourmet_chef: Become a world-class chef, learn and cook all the recipes you can find
grandpa.craft_master: Get used to making things with your hands, and craft as many items as you can
grandpa.legend: Nothing beats cold hard cash. Become rich enough, and buy your happiness
grandpa.mystery_of_the_stardrops: A healthy body is a healthy mind. Get in shape by increasing your energy to the maximum.
grandpa.mad_hatter: In life, it's important to be able to wear many hats. Trust no one, and wear all of them!
grandpa.ultimate_foodie: Learn to enjoy all the good things in life, and taste a little bit of everything you can find!
grandpa.allsanity: You cannot leave anyone stranded in a Burger King. Leave no loose ends
grandpa.perfection: For a fulfilling life, you need to do a lot of everything. Leave no loose ends
moviesanity.movie.journey_of_the_prairie: Journey Of The Prairie King: The Motion Picture
moviesanity.movie.natural_wonders_explor: Natural Wonders: Exploring Our Vibrant World
dialogue.george.tv_remote_donated: Remember that complicated remote you gave me? I never could quite get used to it. It was always triggering random things in the rooms of the house... I brought it to the old Community Center.
dialogue.george.tv_remote_given: I got this fancy new remote, but I can't figure it out. It's always triggering random things in the rooms of the house. Youngsters like you like these things, you can have it.
tv.gazette.intro: Welcome back to the Gateway Gazette! The bi-weekly show where brave adventurers explore the strange topology of the world around us!
tv.gazette.episode: On today's episode, our agent {{agent}} has traversed from {{from}} and discovered... {{to}}! They came back safe and sound to share this wonderful knowledge with us!
tv.gazette.chaos_episode: On today's episode, our agent {{agent}} was sent to explore... but we haven't heard back from them. Let's send them thoughts and prayers! Don't walk outside unprepared, kids!
junimo.orange: Look! Me gib pretty for orange thing!
junimo.red: Give old things for red gubbins!
junimo.grey: I trade rocks for grey what's-its!
junimo.yellow: I hab seeds, gib yellow gubbins!
junimo.blue: I hab fish! You give blue pretty?
config.open_mail.name: Open mail
config.open_mail.tooltip: Hotkey that can be pressed to open the next piece of mail when no other interface is opened.
config.remote_cc.name: Remote Community Center
config.remote_cc.tooltip: Whether the local community center should automatically synchronize to the server state. This will complete bundles if they are marked as completed on the server
config.seed_shop.name: Enable Seed Shop Overhaul
config.seed_shop.tooltip: Seed shops are rebalanced to be more in line with the lore and intended gameplay design of Archipelago
config.hide_empty_letters.name: Hide Empty Archipelago Letters
config.hide_empty_letters.tooltip: Letters that contain neither an item nor an unlock will be skipped, reducing clutter
config.disable_letter_templates.name: Disable Letter Templates
config.disable_letter_templates.tooltip: All Archipelago letters will now use a very short and concise format instead of the funny ones full of fluff
config.hide_npc_gifts.name: Hide NPC Gift Mail
config.hide_npc_gifts.tooltip: All received NPC gifts will be skipped, reducing clutter
config.custom_icons.name: Use Custom Archipelago Icons
config.custom_icons.tooltip: Alternate art style for the Archipelago icons used in various places in the mod
config.skip_hold_up.name: Skip Hold Up Animations
config.skip_hold_up.tooltip: Skip all the 'Hold an item above your head' animations
config.disable_friendship_decay.name: Disable Friendship Decay
config.disable_friendship_decay.tooltip: Friendship points no longer go down when you don't talk to NPCs
config.bonus_speed.name: Bonus Per Movement Speed
config.bonus_speed.tooltip: Speed increase per movement speed bonus received.
config.multiplayer_vision.name: Multiplayer Vision
config.multiplayer_vision.tooltip: Allow Stardew Players in the same multiworld to see each other in game
config.anonymize_chat.name: Anonymize names in chat
config.anonymize_chat.tooltip: Replace every player name with a random animal, in chat and menus, for privacy reasons
config.display_chat_items.name: Display Items In Chat
config.display_chat_items.tooltip: Which items notifications should display in chat
config.connection_messages.name: Display Connection Messages
config.connection_messages.tooltip: Whether to display connection messages in chat when players join or leave
config.chat_messages.name: Display Chat Messages
config.chat_messages.tooltip: Whether to display chat messages from other players in the multiworld
config.calendar_indicators.name: Show Calendar Indicators
config.calendar_indicators.tooltip: Whether to display Archipelago indicators on calendar dates with remaining location checks
config.elevator_indicators.name: Show Elevator Indicators
config.elevator_indicators.tooltip: Whether to display Archipelago indicators on elevator floors with remaining location checks
config.strict_logic.name: Strict Logic
config.strict_logic.tooltip: Disables some out-of-logic obtention methods for some critical progression items. Examples: Mystery boxes, Prize Tickets
config.item_indicators.name: Show Item Indicators
config.item_indicators.tooltip: Whether to display Archipelago indicators on items with related remaining location checks
config.multisleep_season.name: MultiSleep Season Behavior
config.multisleep_season.tooltip: When multisleeping across a month transition, what season is picked next?
config.grandpa_shrine.name: Grandpa Shrine Icons
config.grandpa_shrine.tooltip: When to display Grandpa Evaluation Icons over the shrine
config.sprite_randomizer.name: Sprite Randomizer
config.start_lotl.name: Start with Livin' Off the Land
config.start_lotl.tooltip:
Whether to start with the "Livin' Off the Land" TV Channel unlocked. Otherwise, wait for it as an unlock from the multiworld.
The Archipelago episodes are on Tuesdays and Fridays, and runs vanilla episodes on the vanilla days of Mondays and Thursdays
config.start_gazette.name: Start with The Gateway Gazette
config.start_gazette.tooltip:
Whether to start with the "Gateway Gazette" TV Channel unlocked. Otherwise, wait for it as an unlock from the multiworld.
The channel gives information about the current entrance randomizer roll, on Mondays and Fridays
config.allow_hand_breaking.name: Allow Hand Breaking
config.allow_hand_breaking.tooltip:
Whether to allow the player to break items with their bare hands.
It takes many more hits than with the proper tool, and is solely intended to avoid getting physically stuck behind things.
config.bookseller_multiplier.name: Bookseller Price Multiplier
config.bookseller_multiplier.tooltip: Multiplier to apply to the bookseller book prices
config.scout_hints.name: Preference for Scout Hints
config.scout_hints.tooltip: What items should automatically generate scout hints when being previewed. If playing in a multiworld, the minimum is 'HintOnlyProgression'
config.custom_assets.name: Custom Assets
config.custom_assets.tooltip: Use custom assets for scouted items when available
config.custom_assets_flexible.name: Custom Assets flexibility across games
config.custom_assets_flexible.tooltip: If a custom asset for the correct game doesn't exist, allow using an asset for the same item name in a different game
config.custom_assets_generic.name: Custom assets generic game icons
config.custom_assets_generic.tooltip: If a custom asset for the correct item doesn't exist, use a generic custom asset for the game itself
config.lupini_scouted.name: Show Lupini Scouted Item
config.lupini_scouted.tooltip: When looking at a Lupini Painting for sale, whether to show the scouted item icon instead of the painting texture
config.limit_tools_level.name: Limit hoe and watering can levels
config.limit_tools_level.tooltip: Makes hoes and watering cans behave as if they were at the basic level no matter what. Generally used for animation cancelling.
config.legacy_randomization.name: Use Legacy Randomization
config.legacy_randomization.tooltip: Equivalent to the vanilla advanced option of the same name. Only applies at the moment of creating the save file
config.repeatable_walnuts.name: Bonus Repeatable Walnuts
config.repeatable_walnuts.tooltip: Whether to allow bonus repeatable walnuts to spawn after the 5th one. This can be required to compensate if the players wastes his walnuts. This can trivialize the Walnut Hunter goal.
config.jojapocalypse_harder_goals.name: Jojapocalypse Harder Goals
config.jojapocalypse_harder_goals.toolti: This will make it so some Jojapocalypse goals have extra conditions, in addition to locations checked, to trigger.
config.jojapocalypse_percent.name: Jojapocalypse Minimum Completion Percent
config.jojapocalypse_percent.tooltip: Prevent sending goal as a Joja member until this percent of locations are checked.
config.connection_retries.name: Number of times to retry connections before auto-sleeping
config.connection_retries.tooltip: After X reconnections failed, the character will automatically go to sleep to save the game, in case of crashing. Set to -1 to continue retrying unlimited times
traveling_merchant.not_here: The traveling merchant isn't here today.
traveling_merchant.flair.low_stock: I'm sorry I don't have much to offer. Maybe do something else in the meantime?
traveling_merchant.flair.default: I got lots of good stuff for sale!
traveling_merchant.flair.feed_family: Sweety, will you please buy something? I have a family to feed
traveling_merchant.flair.museum_hint: I found something interesting, and I hear {{player}} wants someone to donate it to the Museum...
wizard_book.dialogue.question: Wizard's Magic Book
carpenter.funded: I see here someone has already funded an upgrade for your house.
carpenter.start_now: Do you want me to start working on that right away?
carpenter.paid_kitchen: {{player}} paid for a Kitchen and a Master Bedroom.
carpenter.paid_second_floor: {{player}} paid for an entire second floor, including one extra bedroom.
carpenter.paid_cellar: {{player}} paid for a Cellar and 33 Casks.
carpenter.cellar_goat_cheese: I hope I'll get to taste an aged Goat Cheese!
carpenter.town_start: If you ever start something with one of the people in town, you'll be ready!
carpenter.pop_question: Are you planning on popping the question to {{who}} soon?
carpenter.new_lives: You and {{spouse}} will be ready to start your new lives!
carpenter.no_kid_beds: But you probably won't need the kid beds
carpenter.adopt: You and {{spouse}} will be able to adopt a baby!
carpenter.expecting_you: Are you expecting a baby with {{spouse}}?
billboard.reroll.chatMessage: {{player}} has chickened out and rerolled the daily billboard quest!
chat.connected: Connected to Archipelago as {{slot}}. Type !!help to view client commands.
chat.fatal_error: A fatal error occurred while initializing Archipelago. Check SMAPI for details and report the issue.
location.the_legend_of_the_winter_star: The Legend of the Winter Star
sleep.cannot_afford: Cannot afford to continue multisleeping. Cost: {{cost}}g/day
sleep.many.message:
How many days do you wish to sleep for?
(Warning: Sleeping saves the game, this action cannot be undone)
sleep.until.message:
Sleep Until...
(Warning: Sleeping saves the game, this action cannot be undone)
